name: Curry Butter - Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon (If Garam Masala is not available, use 2 tablespoons) Curry powder
1 small Green Chili, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer to a bowl and spread thinly on toast or use as desired.
